pairs.question: What is an AI avatar in the context of this project?
pairs.answer: An AI avatar in this project refers to a VRM 3D character that reacts to user interactions such as chatting with AI or pressing Enter. It is designed to enhance user experience by providing visual feedback and animations, making interactions more engaging and dynamic.

pairs.question: How can users install the AI Avatar Chrome extension?
pairs.answer: Users can install the AI Avatar Chrome extension directly from the Chrome Web Store by visiting the provided link: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/ai-avatar/afmcfaeaaojalninahhhjnonhmlmiidi.

pairs.question: What are the key features introduced in Version 5 of the AI Avatar?
pairs.answer: Version 5 introduced several key features: 1) Added bones to the fingers for more expressive hand poses like peace signs. 2) Changed animation values from radians to degrees for better readability. 3) Made the background customizable (black or gray) and fixed issues with hand visibility. 4) Enabled the Enter key in the terminal to trigger animations in the VS Code extension.

pairs.question: Can you provide a code snippet demonstrating how to trigger an avatar animation programmatically?
What are the personalities and characteristics of the new default avatars introduced in Version 6?
pairs.answer: Version 6 introduced four new default avatars with distinct personalities: 1) Sweet Purple: Bright, cheerful, aspiring pop star who enjoys food and makes cute poses. 2) Candy Pink: Kind and considerate, good at faking smiles, and makes cute poses. 3) Maximum Blue: Active and energetic, with cool poses and a charming demeanor. 4) Hyper Yellow: A goofy developer who tries to make cool apps but often ends up silly, making silly poses.

pairs.question: How can users customize the background color of the AI Avatar?
pairs.answer: Users can customize the background color of the AI Avatar by selecting between black or gray in the settings. This change was made to improve visibility, especially when the avatar is wearing black gloves, which were previously hard to see against a black background.

pairs.question: What are some of the future update ideas for the AI Avatar project?
pairs.answer: Future update ideas include: 1) Adding more AI features for enhanced interactivity. 2) Introducing additional triggers for avatar reactions. 3) Providing more adjustable parameters for customization. 4) Expanding the library of avatars and animations. 5) Improving the animation editor to make it more user-friendly.
